q: Describe a healthy lifestyle choice you made.
cue_card: A healthy lifestyle choice you made.
And explain why you think it is a healthy choice
examiner_note: Khi miêu tả một thói quen lành mạnh, hãy tập trung vào sự cam kết (commitment, consistency) và lợi ích dài hạn (long-term benefits, preventive care). Sử dụng các từ vựng liên quan đến sức khỏe thể chất hoặc tinh thần (well-being, vitality, holistic approach).

samples.band7: I'd like to talk about a healthy choice I made last year, which was to start drinking more water every day. I realized I was often tired and got headaches because I wasn't hydrated enough. I started carrying a large water bottle with me everywhere I go, and I set reminders on my phone. It's a healthy choice because staying hydrated helps my skin, gives me more energy, and improves my overall health. I feel much better since I started doing this.
samples.band8: I’m going to describe a significant lifestyle change I undertook about a year ago: adopting a daily meditation practice. I made this choice when I noticed that my stress levels were negatively impacting my sleep and productivity. To implement it, I committed to sitting quietly for fifteen minutes every morning before starting my day, using a guided app to stay focused. I consider this a profoundly healthy choice because it has fundamentally improved my mental well-being, enhancing my emotional resilience and allowing me to approach daily challenges with a clearer, more balanced mindset.
samples.band9: A transformative lifestyle decision I made was shifting towards a primarily whole-food, plant-based diet, a change I initiated roughly two years ago. This conscious decision stemmed from a desire to take a more holistic approach to my health and reduce my environmental footprint. I implemented this gradually by substituting processed foods and heavy meats with nutrient-dense legumes, vegetables, and whole grains. This dietary overhaul is unequivocally a healthy choice; it's practically a form of preventive care that has significantly boosted my vitality, optimized my immune system, and fostered a profound sense of physical and ethical alignment.

v.meaning: Được cung cấp đủ nước (Cause to absorb water)
v.example: Athletes need to stay hydrated during training in hot weather.

v.meaning: Sự kiên cường về mặt cảm xúc (The ability to adapt to stressful situations or crises)
v.example: Meditation can significantly build your emotional resilience.

v.meaning: Cách tiếp cận toàn diện (Characterized by the treatment of the whole person, taking into account mental and social factors, rather than just the physical symptoms)
v.example: We need a more holistic approach to healthcare that focuses on prevention.

v.meaning: Sự thay đổi/cải tổ hoàn toàn về chế độ ăn (A thorough examination of diet with changes made if necessary)
v.example: After his heart attack, a complete dietary overhaul was necessary.

v.meaning: Chăm sóc phòng ngừa (Measures taken for disease prevention, as opposed to disease treatment)
v.example: Eating well and exercising are the cornerstones of preventive care.

v.meaning: Sinh khí, sức sống (The state of being strong and active; energy)
v.example: Despite his age, he is full of vitality and energy.

topic: Describe a healthy lifestyle choice you made.
